title: GWHOLE Christmas Crafts Snowman Wooden Bead with Face,123 pcs Christmas Bead Kit for Adult DIY Bracelet Making Winter Xmas Tree Decoration
features: Package Include: Snowman beads x 24 sets, 2m Ribbon x 2pcs,20m Rope x 1pcs

Sizes: The size of snowman face wooden beads, snowman belly wooden beads and white wooden beads is 20mm/0.78inch, Christmas buffalo plaid bead is 14mm/0.55inch, grid ribbon is 2m/ 2.18 yard and hemp rope is 20m/65.6inch.
Material: Made of high quality natural wood, won't easily break. Patterns on beads will not fade for a long time, could spend several Christmases with you

DIY Crafts: You can bring into play your imagination to make Christmas snowman decoration with these cute wooden beads freely. Can be combined with any other accessories to create your own ingenious decoration.
Wide Application: Create your own Christmas decoration, put the beads together as garland, necklace, bracelet or little wooden snowman
